overall.description: First-person exploration through a coastal urban wasteland in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring abandoned stilt houses, futuristic mega-skyscrapers in the background, and a group of people gathered around a vintage truck. The scene transitions from open dirt paths to a narrow settlement area during golden hour lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through an open dirt field toward abandoned structures with futuristic skyscrapers visible in the distance

entered.detail: futuristic mega-structure with neon signage towering above the horizon
large metal roller coaster structure visible against the skyline
dilapidated wooden house raised on stilts with weathered exterior
tall palm tree casting long shadows in the golden hour light
elevated concrete overpass with industrial lighting underneath

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide dirt path through an abandoned coastal area, with palm trees scattered about and long shadows cast by the setting sun. Futuristic mega-skyscrapers rise in the distant background contrasting with the derelict wooden stilt houses on the left, while a roller coaster structure is visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between abandoned stilt houses

events.description: moves from open field into narrow corridor between wooden stilt houses

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrow path between abandoned buildings, approaching a group of people in the distance

entered.detail: weathered wooden house on stilts with external staircase
low concrete retaining wall covered in colorful graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a narrow passage between dilapidated stilt houses, with the space becoming more enclosed as vegetation increases. The roller coaster fades from view behind the structures on the right, while the path leads toward a gathering of people visible near a parked vehicle ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: gathering area with vintage truck and group of people

events.description: discovers a group of people gathered around a vintage truck with one person lying on the ground

agents.ego_description: approaching a gathering of people around a vintage pickup truck, observing a person lying on the ground near the vehicle

notable_agents.action: person in red pants standing near the truck hood holding an object
person lying prone on the ground next to the truck's front wheel

entered.detail: dark-colored vintage pickup truck with chrome grille and blue wheels
cluster of individuals in colorful clothing gathered around the vehicle

segments.scene_description: The camera arrives at a gathering where a vintage pickup truck is parked among the stilt houses, surrounded by people in colorful outfits. One person lies on the ground near the truck while others stand around, creating a tense atmosphere in the golden hour light filtering through the buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: crowded settlement area with vehicle and onlookers

events.description: begins circling around the group to observe from different angles

agents.ego_description: moving around the perimeter of the group, observing the people in colorful costumes and the person on the ground from various angles

notable_agents.action: person in blue jacket and yellow pants standing near the truck bed
person in red jacket facing away from camera, observing the scene

segments.scene_description: The camera circles around the gathering, revealing more individuals in vibrant clothing standing near the truck. The group appears to be engaged in some activity around the person on the ground, with the abandoned stilt houses framing the scene on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: exiting the settlement back toward open area

events.description: moves away from the group and exits the narrow settlement area

agents.ego_description: walking away from the gathering, leaving the group behind and moving toward more open ground

segments.scene_description: The camera retreats from the gathering, leaving the truck and group behind as it moves back through the stilt houses toward more open ground. The mega-skyscrapers and roller coaster become visible again in the distance as the settlement is left behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, desolate coastal path into the claustrophobic heart of a derelict stilt-house settlement. It begins on an open dirt road flanked by scattered palm trees, where the setting sun casts long shadows against a backdrop of distant mega-skyscrapers and a skeletal roller coaster. As the camera advances, the expansive horizon narrows, and the scene shifts into a tight passage between dilapidated wooden structures as overgrown vegetation begins to crowd the frame. The roller coaster gradually fades from view behind the buildings before the path finally opens up toward a gathering of people clustered around a parked vehicle.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins within a tense social gathering in a narrow settlement and retreats back into a vast urban wasteland. It begins by arriving at a vintage pickup truck parked among stilt houses, where people in colorful outfits surround an individual lying on the ground under the filtered glow of the golden hour. As the camera circles the group, the vibrant clothing of the bystanders and the framing of the abandoned dwellings emphasize the claustrophobic atmosphere of the gathering. The scene then shifts as the camera retreats from the truck and the crowd, moving backward through the stilt houses toward more open ground. Finally, the settlement recedes into the background, revealing the towering mega-skyscrapers and a distant roller coaster against the horizon.
